# Heat Dragon

> Gas Safe registered heating and plumbing engineer serving South London. Boiler installation and repair, bathroom renovation, gas safety certificates (CP12), central heating and unvented cylinders. Most jobs are quoted from photos — customers do not wait in for a site visit. Fixed quotes: the price agreed is the price paid, with no surprise extras. A deposit secures a firm date in the diary.

## Services

- Boiler installation: combi and system boilers — supplied, installed, commissioned and registered with Gas Safe
- Boiler repair and annual servicing
- Gas safety certificates (CP12) for landlords and homeowners
- Bathroom renovation: full refits, fitted to a high standard
- Central heating: radiators, TRVs, system upgrades
- Unvented hot water cylinders (G3 certified)
- Leaks and general plumbing repairs

## How it works

1. Customers send a few photos, their postcode and a short description via the quote form at https://heatdragon.uk/#quote (or WhatsApp).
2. A fixed quote is returned, usually within two working days — most jobs are priced without a site visit.
3. A deposit holds a confirmed date in the diary; arrival times are kept.

## Service area

South London, including Clapham, Brixton, Dulwich, Peckham, Streatham, Balham, Tooting and Wandsworth.

## Credentials

- Gas Safe registered
- G3 unvented hot water certification
- £2m public liability insurance

## Contact

- Website and quote form: https://heatdragon.uk/
- Quotes are free; photos make them faster and more accurate.
